description: Deployed full-stack billing portal application using hybrid-deployment strategy with GCP and on-premises VM.
Created automation between the ERP, Stripe, and the billing portal to record payments towards customer's balances, saving countless hours of manual accounting activity per month.
Created an automation for HR to reduce manual work involved in the hiring process by syncing documents and preparing various workflows.
Created automated deployment pipeline via GitHub Actions, GCP, Docker, and a linux VM.
Improved billing portal test coverage greatly, adding thousands of test cases to prevent regression and validate feature functionality.
Designed and implemented internal-facing CMS extension for the billing portal for staff of varying needs such as sales, management, IT, and more.
Created a batch-processing system for onboarding hundreds to thousands of customers at any point in time and tracking status and sending notifications during the onboarding process.
Created an automation for Sales to send weekly reports to management on the state of the sales boards.

Redesigned and extended automated invoice generation to include pay by mail page, how to pay section, balance summary, and added numerous items to pages such as sales orders, reference numbers, rate-based usage charges, and more.
Integrated helpdesk widget on portal allowing customers to interact with staff and look at articles, FAQs, and more.
Implemented a custom role-based access control (RBAC) for the billing portal.
Created numerous environments for varying use-cases, such as a development, dockerized development, testing, CI/CD, and production environments.
Set up auto-backup process for the billing portal's database via bash, GCP, and cron.
Created automation to validate and add printer meter readings to the ERP software for many printers sent by printers via email automatically.

Extended the billing portal to include a wallet page for managing autopay and payment methods, invoice history page for viewing past invoices, billing info component for showing billing period information, additional metrics from the ERP to show on billable sections in billing components, additional payment type support, and more.
Set up an automation in Google Sheets via GCP and GCP SDK to automatically share onboarding status information with staff from the portal.
Redesigned billing portal's database to be better normalized and extensible from one table to over a dozen.
Added interesting 'mock' feature allowing staff of adequate privileges to see what customer's see, minus the ability to take any action on the customer's behalf.
Set up observability, logging, secret management, and more for the billing portal.
Created a custom LLM-powered Visual Studio Code extension, called Ferrell, that is designed to support software development students.
Built the extension from scratch, connecting a modern webview frontend to a dockerized backend and database hosted on AWS.
Implemented automated CI/CD pipelines, strict code-styling, detailed documentation, and gave regular progress demos to university stakeholders.
Presented the architecture and capabilities to a diverse audience as a featured speaker at Ferris AI Day.
Researched top educational AI tooling like ChatGPT Study Mode, Flint, SocraticQ, and other tools to determine what features to implement.

Working with the founder of a Kuwait-based software consultancy company, I built a full-stack eCommerce web application for selling, creating, and distributing personalized children's books using TypeScript, React, PayloadCMS, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Next.js, Docker, and PostgreSQL with various ML solutions for feature-based personalization.
Researched and evaluated dozens of ML models and platforms for image generation, mixing, face-swapping, and feature alteration to power the book personalization engine.
Implemented comprehensive i18n (English and Arabic) for international reach, and customized the PayloadCMS admin dashboard to streamline book creation and content management.
Containerized the application stack using Docker and Docker Compose, ensuring parity and reliability across development and production environments.
Managed product direction and feature prioritization by leading weekly progress demos and strategy syncs with key stakeholders.

experiences.company: Kendall College of Art and Design
description: Created the backend for a billing portal using Spring Boot, Spring Security, MS SQL Server, and MariaDB.
Managed project for team on GitHub, including organizing project, adding items to the backlog, doing code reviews, updating statuses, assigning issues, and more.

Created API-based integration with ERP software the company that provided the grant used, which was extremely large in size (e.g., thousands of tables, tens of thousands of columns, etc.) and undocumented.
Developed key frontend components using React and TypeScript, including secure login, payment, and autopay UIs.
Created an automated invoice generator using web technologies, IronPdf, and Thymeleaf.
